item.title: Walking 40 ft with ankle weights today.
item.description: Walking with ankle weights and turning the corner without having to stop and keeping my balance. I hope everyone is doing well and having a great day. It has been a while and I wanted give an update.

item.title: Confirmation that Elon Musk used DOGE to acquire new business with the US government (and more).
item.description: ^^^Representative Melanie Stansbury (D-NM)^^^ If this is true, it's a bombshell and we can't let them get away with it without making them hurt... So... make some noise if you can. Call your member(s) of Congress. Participate/volunteer on a local level. Engage in legal/civil disobedience. Talk to your family and friends. All the things. Or, some of the things... choose your own adventure. But please, try and do something. At this point Musk should have zero to do with our government More from Rep. Stansbury: https://youtu.be/wGZ5gQG8N4Q?si=Jey553dKKTmygODR
item.dc:creator: trustfallaccident

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.31 LATE NIGHT FEELINGS
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Yuanbin Hu LeBlanc
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Late Night Feelings - Mark Ronson feat. Lykke Li YouTube: https://youtu.be/OpNJTr7q1LM?si=drxkbsGt3ooba3Sw Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/7aQeWViSfRWSEwtJD86Eq0?si=b59e83bb70b84eb8
Moon Colony
Alex Alenseenko
Luye Liang Shanzhong
Wenjun Lin
Filipe Pagliuso
Emilyena Strange
Sergey Chernigin
Ismail Inceoglu
Inhyuk Lee
Joao Marcello
Emilyena Strange
Veronika Kozlova
Mam Ba
TONTON REVOLVER
Robin Li
Jun Kim
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Leopards eating many faces in April
item.description:
1. Hope he is happy.
2. Fafo.
3. Fafo!
4. Probably still doesn't regret his vote.
5. He voted for this.
6. Got what he wanted.
7. Wholly to blame?
8. Definitely skipped class on tariffs.
9. Even worse days ahead. And the idiot went back to golfing.
10. Hopefully we survive.
item.dc:creator: MidlifecrisisDad

item.title: What Happened Today #63
item.description: Trump is consolidating power faster than he can spell DEI. From defying court orders to purging national security staff and threatening universities, the administration is rewriting the rules—and punishing anyone who resists. Even Wall Street and the country's biggest law firm flinched. They’re testing the limits. It’s up to us to show where the line is. Subscribe free at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist LINKS 1. https://www.cnbc.com/2025/04/03/stock-market-today-live-updates.html 2. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/gen-timothy-haugh-head-of-nsa-and-cyber-command-is-fired/ 3. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/apr/03/laura-loomer-trump-meeting 4. https://www.npr.org/2025/04/03/nx-s1-5351751/voting-executive-order-lawsuit 5. https://www.rockymounttelegram.com/news/national/measles-spreads-to-central-texas-5-states-have-active-outbreaks/article_df9a9f15-09d9-4cd6-a641-f2f5d1533b72.html 6. https://abcnews.go.com/Technology/wireStory/brown-university-half-billion-federal-funding-halted-trump-120471799 7. https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5231021-trump-supports-proxy-voting_parents/ 8. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/04/03/senate-confirmation-mehmet-oz-medicare-medicaid-00270913 9. https://defensescoop.com/2025/04/03/investigation-hegseth-signal-gate-dod-inspector-general/ 10. https://www.msn.com/en-ie/news/world/rally-and-court-hearing-set-for-maryland-man-mistakenly-deported-to-el-salvador-prison/ar-AA1CgJER 11. https://www.courthousenews.com/federal-judge-says-shell-block-trumps-11-billion-cuts-to-public-health-funding/ 12. https://apnews.com/article/dei-trump-school-discrimination-federal-funding-7d1025753b9bd924711ace4069fca399 13. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/rfk-jr-hhs-job-cuts-doge-mistakes/ 14. https://motorillustrated.com/volkswagen-will-indicate-import-tariff-as-separate-fee-on-window-stickers/151765/ 15. https://www.nytimes.com/2025/04/04/us/politics/radio-free-europe-funding-trump.html 16. https://www.thecrimson.com/article/2025/4/4/harvard-federal-funding-demands/ 17. https://www.cnn.com/2025/04/03/politics/boasberg-alien-enemies-act-deportation-flights-hearing/index.html 18. https://www.reuters.com/world/us/trump-administration-shutters-dc-foreign-policy-think-tank-wilson-center-2025-04-04/ 19. https://www.reuters.com/world/us/kirkland-ellis-talks-with-white-house-avoid-executive-order-wsj-reports-2025-04-03/ 20. https://federalnewsnetwork.com/hiring-retention/2025/04/irs-will-bring-fired-probationary-employees-back-to-work-by-mid-april/ 21. https://social.demcast.com/toolkit/handsoff-8d1c

item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: No Kings.
item.description:
Hey there. I'm just a guy who loves my country that's terrified about it's current direction and completely underwhelmed by the apathy I see in my fellow citizens.
If we the people don't find some fire in our hearts and spines we are going to guarantee a conflict. I am doing everything in my power to be a speed bump to autocracy and I'm hoping a video like this will inspire other to have hard conversations with our friends and family that have decided to ignore the suffering of others and the degradation of our freedoms. Americans we need to act. Thanks for reading. I hope something good happens for you. Stay safe and sane in these turbulent times.
item.dc:creator: sinestroxlodx

item.dc:creator: TheReturnOfMadJuan

item.title: The Trump admin is arresting and pushing out legal immigrants for the high crime of criticizing Israel.
item.description:
If there's anything in Congress for Cory Booker to do a protest speech for, it's this. But he votes in favor of Israel just the same as any Republican.
Ta-Nehisi Coates did a talk in University of Michigan in February where he made a really good point regarding opposition to Trump. There isn't one, and the canary in the coal mine was the general Democrat's response to the genocide in Gaza.
Malcolm X called it out a long time ago too. The genocide in Palestine is a moral priority for it has immediate consequences in your daily life whether you're able to see it or not.
item.dc:creator: WarmMachineDD7

item.title: Some more memes to battle the bots/spam
item.description:
Some of us are trying to procrastinate instead of work, damnit! So here are some stuff I sent my ex-"it's complicated" partner. All reposts, sorry.
(not sure if this is real or satire, but funny nevertheless.)
Hope you (continue to) have a good day. Feel free to share any advice for writer's block!
item.dc:creator: DutchBoeremeisie

item.title: Images of Note: Momma was a techical
item.description:
IT GOES DEEP
Elbow Deep in a Herse sounds like a rejected name for My Chemical Romance
It is very disgusting, they should kiss about it. Also you can tell the OG "Artist" was American because they imply Americans know more about European-ness than Europeans.
yeah :c
Honey I think you might be a little sapphic
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips!
